description: Style NoteThe rising temperature has us all in a tizzy but this stylish pair of sandals is one reason why we love the summer! catwalk comes up with warm weather footwear essentials that turn traditional fashion styles on its head. This beautifully crafted pair will transform your daily spring wear with a bold yet graceful edge. Product DetailsBlue and brown thing straps with a floral detail and a fabric toe separatorBrown padded footbed with a heel patchTPU outsole stitched to the footbed and has patterned grooves at the outsoleMaterial and Care SyntheticWipe with a clean cloth to remove dustDo not store under sunlight
